message:
fix: Remove double error union (!!) in method return types

The code was emitting error union twice when:
1. needs_error was true → first emit at line 1564
2. Method returns nested class constructor → second emit at line 1644

Fixed by moving the error union emit to each specific path that needs it,
instead of emitting it early in the block. The nested class constructor
path already emits its own error union unconditionally.

Paths that now correctly emit error union:
- Returns self: if (needs_error) try self.emit("!");
- Returns param: if (needs_error) try self.emit("!");
- Inferred type / default: if (needs_error) try self.emit("!");
- Returns nested class: unconditional (already correct)
